Authors and Citation

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Amiryousefi A, Wala J (2026). tlsR: Detection and Spatial Analysis of Tertiary Lymphoid Structures. R package version 0.3.0, https://github.com/labsyspharm/tlsR. 

@Manual{,
  title = {tlsR: Detection and Spatial Analysis of Tertiary Lymphoid Structures},
  author = {Ali Amiryousefi and Jeremiah Wala},
  year = {2026},
